domain_name: Describe Artificial Intelligence workloads and considerations

objective_statement: Identify guiding principles for responsible AI (fairness, reliability and safety, privacy and security, inclusiveness, transparency, accountability)

objective_statement: Describe core machine learning concepts (features and labels in a dataset, training and validation datasets)

objective_statement: Describe Azure Machine Learning capabilities (automated machine learning, data and compute services for data science, model management and deployment)

objective_statement: Identify Azure tools and services for computer vision tasks (Azure AI Vision service, Azure AI Face detection service)

objective_statement: Identify features of common NLP workload scenarios (key phrase extraction, entity recognition, sentiment analysis, language modeling, speech recognition and synthesis, translation)

objective_statement: Identify Azure tools and services for NLP workloads (Azure AI Language service, Azure AI Speech service)
